item.title: Association Management
item.dc:creator: dan
item.content:encoded:
Association Management Software to Grow & Engage Members

Grow your membership, increase engagement, and simplify operations with the best
association management software.

Speak with an Expert

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Streamline membership management with association management tools fit for you.
Take your association to the next level
Engage members and drive growth with Momentive's association management solutions. Our experts are here to help you find the perfect fit for your organization's needs.
Streamline operations. Engage members. Drive growth.
Momentive’s association management software empowers you to do more with less. Our AMS solutions simplify administrative tasks, enhance member engagement, and provide actionable insights.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:14:"box-bx-id-card";s:5:"title";s:21:"Membership Management";s:11:"description";s:103:"Easily track, manage, and grow your membership with automated workflows and personalized communication.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-1";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:12:"box-bx-happy";s:5:"title";s:20:"Community Engagement";s:11:"description";s:90:"Build stronger connections with members through surveys, forums, and personalized content.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-2";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:22:"box-bx-bar-chart-alt-2";s:5:"title";s:20:"Data & Analytics";s:11:"description";s:73:"Gain real-time insights with customizable dashboards and reporting tools.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-3";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:21:"box-bx-doughnut-chart";s:5:"title";s:15:"Financial Tools";s:11:"description";s:72:"Manage dues, payments, and budgets with seamless financial integrations.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}}

Momentive offers today's leading association management software solutions to address the unique needs of association of all sizes and specific needs of your organization. Whether you need advanced analytics, all-in-one simplicity, or enterprise-level customization, we have the right solution for you.

a:5:{s:6:"item-0";a:6:{s:4:"logo";s:3:"641";s:5:"title";s:9:"NimbleAMS";s:11:"description";s:98:"Built on Salesforce, Nimble AMS delivers analytics and automation for large, complex associations.";s:9:"link_text";s:18:"Explore Nimble AMS";s:4:"link";s:26:"https://www.nimbleams.com/";s:13:"outbound_link";s:4:"true";}s:6:"item-1";a:6:{s:4:"logo";s:3:"642";s:5:"title";s:8:"NetForum";s:11:"description";s:108:"Securely hosted on Microsoft Azure, NetForum simplifies membership and operations for mid-size associations.";s:9:"link_text";s:16:"Explore NetForum";s:4:"link";s:28:"https://www.netforumams.com/";s:13:"outbound_link";s:4:"true";}s:6:"item-2";a:6:{s:4:"logo";s:3:"643";s:5:"title";s:14:"YourMembership";s:11:"description";s:84:"An all-in-one platform for small associations to manage members and grow engagement.";s:9:"link_text";s:22:"Explore YourMembership";s:4:"link";s:27:"https://yourmembership.com/";s:13:"outbound_link";s:4:"true";}s:6:"item-3";a:6:{s:4:"logo";s:3:"644";s:5:"title";s:6:"Aptify";s:11:"description";s:88:"Customizable and scalable, Aptify is ideal for enterprise-level unions and associations.";s:9:"link_text";s:14:"Explore Aptify";s:4:"link";s:23:"https://www.aptify.com/";s:13:"outbound_link";s:4:"true";}s:6:"item-4";a:6:{s:4:"logo";s:4:"1842";s:5:"title";s:6:"Cobalt";s:11:"description";s:121:"Powered by Microsoft Dynamics 365, Cobalt offers member and certification management tools for mid to large associations.";s:9:"link_text";s:14:"Explore Cobalt";s:4:"link";s:19:"https://cobalt.net/";s:13:"outbound_link";s:4:"true";}}
We’re here to help! Find answers to the most common questions about our Association Management solutions.

a:6:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:8:"question";s:61:"In a amet eu ut in eleifend vel sem auctor sodales morbi sed?";s:6:"answer";s:387:"Lectus varius dolor tortor arcu tincidunt. Suspendisse lectus condimentum quis arcu elit tellus. In nisl in ultrices elementum aliquet vestibulum libero. Pellentesque accumsan consequat vulputate massa mollis gravida dignissim rutrum. Pellentesque accumsan consequat vulputate massa mollis gravida dignissim rutrum. Dui sed massa integer semper magna commodo vulputate est. Morbi lacinia metus placerat posuere. Enim praesent?";s:6:"answer";s:387:"Lectus varius dolor tortor arcu tincidunt. Suspendisse lectus condimentum quis arcu elit tellus. In nisl in ultrices elementum aliquet vestibulum libero. Pellentesque accumsan consequat vulputate massa mollis gravida dignissim rutrum. Dui sed massa integer semper magna commodo vulputate est. Morbi lacinia metus placerat posuere. Id ac id pulvinar orci sit. Amet libero quam risus quis.";}}

Momentive's AMS solutions connect effortlessly with the tools you already use, simplifying workflows and ensuring data consistency. Our solutions unify your operations and provide a seamless experience for your team.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:3:{s:21:"icon-integration-item";s:18:"box-bx-bolt-circle";s:22:"title-integration-item";s:22:"Built-in Compatibility";s:28:"description-integration-item";s:145:"

Connect to best-of-breed applications you use every day, including marketing automation, CMS, accounting systems, and more.

 

";}s:6:"item-1";a:3:{s:21:"icon-integration-item";s:11:"box-bx-sync";s:22:"title-integration-item";s:20:"Data Synchronization";s:28:"description-integration-item";s:78:"

Keep your data consistent and up-to-date across systems.

 

";}s:6:"item-2";a:3:{s:21:"icon-integration-item";s:22:"box-bx-git-repo-forked";s:22:"title-integration-item";s:22:"Customizable Workflows";s:28:"description-integration-item";s:81:"

Tailor integrations to fit your unique processes and needs.

 

";}}
Solutions tailored to your association’s unique needs

From small and growing organizations to large and established associations, Momentive’s association management solutions scale to meet your unique challenges.
Whether it’s streamlining member management, automating operations, or enhancing engagement, our tools are built to empower your mission.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:4:"text";s:70:"Simplify operations and grow your membership with user-friendly tools.";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:4:"text";s:65:"Manage simple or complex operations, data, and member engagement.";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:4:"text";s:59:"Flexible solutions that adapt as your organization evolves.";}}

settings=\"%7B%22type%22%3A%22post%22%2C%22post_id%22%3A%22604%22%7D\"]"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"button"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":true},{"id":"92e0db5","elType":"widget","settings":{"image":{"url":"https:\/\/momentivesoftware.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/hero-association-management-scaled.jpg","id":636,"size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"image_size":"full","image_border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"24","right":"24","bottom":"24","left":"24","isLinked":true},"jedv_conditions":[{"_id":"f91b6f2"}],"height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":362,"sizes":[]},"object-fit_mobile":"cover","hide_mobile":"hidden-mobile"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"},{"id":"e101e1d","elType":"widget","settings":{"image":{"url":"https:\/\/momentivesoftware.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2025\/01\/hero-association-management-mobile.jpg","id":637,"size":"","alt":"","source":"library"},"image_size":"full","image_border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"24","right":"24","bottom":"24","left":"24","isLinked":true},"jedv_conditions":[{"_id":"f91b6f2"}],"height_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":362,"sizes":[]},"object-fit_mobile":"cover","hide_desktop":"hidden-desktop","hide_laptop":"hidden-laptop","hide_tablet":"hidden-tablet","_title":"Image mobile","width_mobile":{"unit":"%","size":100,"sizes":[]},"_element_width":"initial","_element_width_mobile":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":20.756},"_flex_size":"none","object-position_mobile":"top center"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"image"}],"isInner":false}]
Streamline operations and boost retention with association management software. Manage memberships, increase engagement, and drive mission success.

item.title: Fundraising
item.dc:creator: dan
item.content:encoded:
Fundraising Software

Fundraising Management at Your Fingertips

Raise more with our smart, simple fundraising software and the support of a partner invested in your success.

Talk to an expert
Watch the Demo

Helping thousands of nonprofits, associations, and other organizations fund their missions.

Grow your revenue with GiveSmart.

Make your mission a movement with our fundraising software

Gain access to all our fundraising tools, from event ticketing and auctions to peer-to-peer campaigns, text-to-give outreach, and everything in between. Better reach your donors with our tools.

What You Get

Fundraising tools that work together

Simplify your fundraising, drive event success, and host successful campaigns with GiveSmart. Access a wide range of tools and features that inspire donors throughout the year.

Helping organizations raise more

$0B

Raised

$0M

Raised YTD (as of 3/31/2026)

Our Fundraising Solutions

Fundraising software that supports your mission and donors

GiveSmart’s flexible, customizable fundraising tools help you do more. From annual galas to golf outings, peer-to-peer runs, or Giving Tuesday campaigns, we provide the solutions to drive your mission forward.

Online Giving  and Payments

Boost donor loyalty and simplify giving with our forms, payments, and features.

Learn more

Auctions and Mobile Bidding

Power seamless auctions from anywhere with accessible tools.

Learn more

Ticketing and Guest Management

Create stress-free events with seamless check-in, seating, and checkout.

Learn more

Custom Forms

Streamline donations, sales, and  sign-ups with our flexible forms.

Learn more

Peer-to-Peer Fundraising and Crowdfunding

Fuel supporter-led fundraising with easy setup and social tools.

Learn more

Campaign and Event Management

Create mission-aligned campaigns with real-time data and complete flexibility.

Learn more

Raffles, Voting, and Item Sales

Engage supporters and increase revenue with built-in revenue enhancers.

Learn more

Text to Donate and SMS

Engage donors instantly with mobile giving and scheduled messages.

Learn more

A true partner for your nonprofit organization

From implementation to support and integrations, Momentive is a true partner for your team.

GiveSmart Integrations

Unlock more donor value with GiveSmart’s integrations for your CRM, event tools, and reporting. Connect your data, streamline workflows, and elevate donor experiences without extra effort.

Learn more

Featured Blog

FAQ

Request a Demo

Connect More. Manage More. Raise More.

GiveSmart by Momentive Software connects organizations with donors on an engaging, modern, all-in-one fundraising solution. Bring on better for your organization’s mission.
item.excerpt:encoded: Boost donor engagement and maximize fundraising success.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Boost donor engagement and maximize fundraising success.
Accelerate your fundraising efforts and propel your mission forward
Discover how Momentive's fundraising solutions can help your organization achieve and exceed its goals.
See how organizations achieve fundraising success with GiveSmart
Simplify your fundraising, drive event success, and host successful campaigns with GiveSmart. Access a wide range of tools and features that inspire donors throughout the year.

a:5:{s:6:"item-0";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:12:"box-bx-money";s:5:"title";s:33:"Centralize Year-Round Fundraising";s:11:"description";s:122:"Enjoy one contract, one payment, and one vendor partner that provides endless fundraising possibilities, all year round.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-1";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:19:"box-bx-donate-heart";s:5:"title";s:26:"Enhanced Donor Experiences";s:11:"description";s:134:"Engage your volunteers with dynamic online fundraising, peer-to-peer campaigns, voting competitions, sponsorship activation, and more.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-2";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:19:"box-bx-check-double";s:5:"title";s:23:"Deliver for Your Guests";s:11:"description";s:121:"Assign seats, automate reports, distribute bidder numbers, and offer easy check-in to enhance your guests’ experiences.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-3";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:12:"box-bx-group";s:5:"title";s:25:"Fundraisers From Anywhere";s:11:"description";s:163:"Easily run and manage an unlimited number of campaigns year-round. From recurring giving to peer-to-peer to text-to-give campaigns and more, we've got you covered.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-4";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:20:"box-bx-calendar-star";s:5:"title";s:15:"Engaging Events";s:11:"description";s:180:"Drive donor engagement and streamline your events with our award-winning auction management, ticketing, seating, and golfer grouping, mobile bidding, live event displays, and more.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}}
We’re here to help! Find answers to the most common questions about our Fundraising solutions.

a:6:{s:6:"item-0";a:2:{s:8:"question";s:61:"What types of fundraising campaigns can I run with GiveSmart?";s:6:"answer";s:167:"With GiveSmart, you can host a variety of campaigns, including auctions, donation drives, peer-to-peer fundraising, ticketed events, and virtual or hybrid fundraisers.";}s:6:"item-1";a:2:{s:8:"question";s:47:"Can GiveSmart handle hybrid and virtual events?";s:6:"answer";s:170:"Absolutely! GiveSmart is designed to support in-person, virtual, and hybrid events with tools for live-streamed auctions, ticketing, mobile bidding, and donor engagement.";}s:6:"item-2";a:2:{s:8:"question";s:46:"Does GiveSmart provide donor management tools?";s:6:"answer";s:170:"Yes, GiveSmart includes robust donor management tools that allow you to track donor activity, segment audiences, and personalize communication for stronger relationships.";}s:6:"item-3";a:2:{s:8:"question";s:64:"How does GiveSmart help with accounting and financial reporting?";s:6:"answer";s:234:"GiveSmart integrates with Momentive's MIP Fund Accounting system to simplify reconciliation and reporting. All transaction data, including donations, ticket sales, and auction proceeds, can be synced directly to your financial system.";}s:6:"item-4";a:2:{s:8:"question";s:62:"What kind of support does GiveSmart provide during onboarding?";s:6:"answer";s:277:"Our team offers dedicated onboarding specialists, customized implementation plans, and training to ensure your organization gets the most out of GiveSmart. Additionally, we offer 24/7 customer support to assist with any technical or financial reporting questions as they arise.";}s:6:"item-5";a:2:{s:8:"question";s:43:"What are the pricing options for GiveSmart?";s:6:"answer";s:183:"GiveSmart offers flexible pricing plans based on your organization’s needs. Contact us to discuss your goals, and we’ll help you select the best plan and set of solutions for you.";}}
Unify donor management, events, and financials

GiveSmart integrates effortlessly with your organization’s workflow, connecting with donor databases, accounting systems, event platforms, and more. Our platform ensures that all your fundraising and financial tools work together seamlessly, saving you time and maximizing your impact.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:3:{s:21:"icon-integration-item";s:11:"box-bx-data";s:22:"title-integration-item";s:21:"Donor CRM Integration";s:28:"description-integration-item";s:119:"

Sync donor activity, contributions, and interactions across your CRM and GiveSmart for a 360-degree donor view.

";}s:6:"item-1";a:3:{s:21:"icon-integration-item";s:23:"box-bx-purchase-tag-alt";s:22:"title-integration-item";s:17:"Event Integration";s:28:"description-integration-item";s:136:"

Easily manage tickets, auctions, and peer-to-peer campaigns while connecting event data to donor profiles and financial systems.

";}s:6:"item-2";a:3:{s:21:"icon-integration-item";s:22:"box-bx-credit-card-alt";s:22:"title-integration-item";s:24:"Flexible Payment Options";s:28:"description-integration-item";s:177:"

Enable secure payment processing with multiple options, including credit cards and mobile payments, while automatically syncing transactions to your accounting software.

";}s:6:"item-3";a:3:{s:21:"icon-integration-item";s:18:"box-bx-spreadsheet";s:22:"title-integration-item";s:22:"Accounting Integration";s:28:"description-integration-item";s:184:"

Streamline reporting and gain financial visibility with the industry's only direct fundraising and accounting solution suite integration with GiveSmart and MIP Fund Accounting.

";}}
Make your mission a movement with our fundraising software
Gain access to all our fundraising tools, from event ticketing and auctions to peer-to-peer campaigns, text-to-give outreach, and everything in between. Better reach your donors with our tools.
Fundraising Software for Nonprofits | Streamline Giving & Events
GiveSmart helps nonprofits manage donations, events, auctions & campaigns in one platform. Simplify operations & increase revenue.
Fundraising software that supports your mission and donors

GiveSmart’s flexible, customizable fundraising tools help you do more. From annual galas to golf outings, peer-to-peer runs, or Giving Tuesday campaigns, we provide the solutions to drive your mission forward.
Connect More. Manage More. Raise More.
GiveSmart by Momentive Software connects organizations with donors on an engaging, modern, all-in-one fundraising solution. Bring on better for your organization’s mission.

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>
hbspt.forms.create({
portalId: "46621835",
formId: "c2e5c876-4e77-4d45-b3c5-3bb3951d68f3",
region: "na1"
});
</script>
Weathering Federal Uncertainty: Nonprofit Operational Trends
How top-performing nonprofits grow revenue through optimism, flexibility, and futureproofing.
A true partner for your nonprofit organization
From implementation to support and integrations, Momentive is a true partner for your team.

a:1:{s:6:"item-0";a:6:{s:34:"image_text_2_cols_rightcol_-_image";s:4:"6883";s:34:"image_text_2_cols_rightcol_-_title";s:22:"GiveSmart Integrations";s:40:"image_text_2_cols_rightcol_-_description";s:190:"Unlock more donor value with GiveSmart’s integrations for your CRM, event tools, and reporting. Connect your data, streamline workflows, and elevate donor experiences without extra effort.";s:41:"image_text_2_cols_rightcol_-_button_label";s:10:"Learn more";s:39:"image_text_2_cols_rightcol_-_button_url";s:55:"/solutions/fundraising-software/givesmart-integrations/";s:37:"image_text_2_cols_rightcol_-_bg_color";s:7:"#e1dbf9";}}

[elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""]
[elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""]

Bring on Better
Fundraising Software

[elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""]
Speak with an Expert

Helping thousands of nonprofits, associations, and other organizations fund their missions.

[elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""]
[elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""][elementor-element k="50d227db86fbaed739f783591551088b" data=""]","scripts":[],"styles":[]}}

item.title: MomentiveIQ
item.dc:creator: dan
item.content:encoded:
MomentiveIQ

Meet our new AI-powered platform designed specifically for nonprofits and associations to unify their technology ecosystem into an intelligent experience that delivers personalized engagement and actionable insights.

Speak with an expert

Innovation Built for Nonprofits and Associations

MomentiveIQ is an intelligent, unified platform that automates workflows, delivers personalized user experiences, and provides predictive insights across your entire ecosystem.
MomentiveIQ’s advanced technology provides:

  • AI Agents that automate workflows and user interactions
  • AI-driven analytics surfacing predictive trends and opportunities
  • Personalized experiences tailored to each user journey
  • Industry-specific integrations with best-in-class security and governance

What you get

Unify your systems. Elevate member and donor value.

We created the most comprehensive and integrated mission-driven platform in the market to deliver a seamless, end-to-end customer experience powered by advanced analytics along with AI-driven recommendations.​

Features & Capabilities

One intelligent experience

With MomentiveIQ, you get real-time data, intuitive dashboards, and a 360° view of engagement without the headaches of managing complex systems. 

AI Analytics

Turn data into decisions with AI-powered insights that unify your ecosystem with interactive dashboards and charts that make complex data easy to understand and act upon.

Integrations & APIs

Connect everything effortlessly with pre-built connectors and APIs, enabling easier integrations between both your current Momentive products and third-party applications to reduce manual processes and eliminate data silos.

AI Agents

Leverage our intelligent workforce that automates workflows and anticipates future outcomes, to deliver personalized suggestions to drive smarter decisions and personalized experiences.

Comprehensive Portal

Create personalized experiences for members, donors, learners, and attendees through configurable dashboard widgets that centralize multi-product interactions while helping staff save time and drive engagement.

Widget Library

Clients are able choose widgets from a centralized library of multi-product interactions that can be displayed in a dashboard view along the admin, donor, learner, volunteer, or member journey.
item.excerpt:encoded: Automate workflows, personalize engagement, and gain predictive insights across your technology ecosystem.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Automate workflows, personalize engagement, and gain predictive insights across your technology ecosystem.
With MomentiveIQ, you get real-time data, intuitive dashboards, and a 360° view of engagement without the headaches of managing complex systems.

Unify your systems. Elevate member and donor value.

We created the most comprehensive and integrated mission-driven platform in the market to deliver a seamless, end-to-end customer experience powered by advanced analytics along with AI-driven recommendations.​

a:5:{s:6:"item-0";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:19:"box-bx-shape-circle";s:5:"title";s:27:"Unified Industry Data Model";s:11:"description";s:105:"Easily integrate workflows with the secure, open data platform and ready-to-use mission-driven data mode.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-1";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:12:"box-bx-chart";s:5:"title";s:13:"AI Analytics ";s:11:"description";s:137:"Unlock critical insights with the advanced analytics and BI reporting engine, delivering real-time visibility to executives and staff​.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-2";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:13:"box-bx-trophy";s:5:"title";s:18:"Service Excellence";s:11:"description";s:127:"Elevate operational excellence and deliver tailored engagement experiences with the comprehensive, extendible AI agent library.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-3";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:13:"box-bx-rocket";s:5:"title";s:19:"Improved Engagement";s:11:"description";s:145:"Boost engagement with our powerful, intelligent application widget library, seamlessly embeddable to power member, donor, and staff experiences. ";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}s:6:"item-4";a:6:{s:4:"icon";s:18:"box-bx-bolt-circle";s:5:"title";s:20:"Intuitive Experience";s:11:"description";s:126:"Access our streamlined user interface for all Momentive products through one portal with simple navigation and single-sign on.";s:9:"link_text";s:0:"";s:4:"link";s:0:"";s:13:"outbound_link";s:5:"false";}}
MomentiveIQ | AI Platform for Nonprofits and Associations
MomentiveIQ uses AI to automate workflows, personalize engagement & deliver predictive insights across your nonprofit tech ecosystem.
